name: Portal to the Next Stage with Kiira Benz

episodes.title: How Culture Shapes Us: Rituals, Influencers, & Cults with Dr. Stephanie Alice Baker
episodes.description:
In this episode of Portal to the Next Stage, I’m in conversation with Dr. Stephanie Alice Baker, a sociologist whose work explores culture, self-optimization, and the evolving relationship between identity and technology. Stephanie shares insights into how wearable devices, digital platforms, and influencer culture are reshaping how we understand ourselves in an increasingly connected world.

We explore:
📱 The rise of wearable technologies and their influence on identity and self-perception
🧠 The “quantified self” and how data becomes part of how we define who we are
💫 The role of influencers in shaping wellness culture and digital aspiration
🔍 Tensions between personal agency and platform-driven metrics
🌐 How immersive technologies are deepening our relationship with digital environments

This episode invites us to think critically about how technology mediates identity—how we see ourselves, how we present ourselves, and how those perceptions are shaped through constant feedback and connection.

▶️ Watch now and join the conversation! 🔗 Stay connected on Instagram @kiirabenz @portaltothenextstage

Additional Credits: Music by King Sis, Vicki Vox - Solid Ground, courtesy of EpidemicSound
